message:
test(fuzz): CredentialObject host-allow + IP-literal predicates (73rkf)

Add fuzz_credential_host_allow covering CredentialObject::is_host_allowed
(credential.rs:205), is_ip_literal (credential.rs:235),
has_ip_literal_in_host_allow (credential.rs:261), and
validate_host_policy (credential.rs:278). These are the egress-proxy
gates deciding whether a credential's secret may be attached to an
outbound request. Properties: empty allow-list permits any host,
case-insensitive exact match, wildcard *.example.com matches subdomains
but NOT the base domain, has_ip_literal_in_host_allow agrees with a
manual scan, validate_host_policy rejects iff reject_ip_literals=true
and the allow-list contains an IP. Once-gated anchors verify each
branch (empty / exact / wildcard subdomain / multi-level subdomain /
base-domain rejection / case folding under wildcard / IPv4 with port
/ IPv6 bracketed and bare / hostname rejection / wildcard-IP detection).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
